title: Passenger Destinations
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DestinationSystem) FROM MissionAccepted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND Name LIKE 'Mission_Passenger%' AND DestinationSystem IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT DestinationSystem AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MissionAccepted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND Name LIKE 'Mission_Passenger%' AND DestinationSystem IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DestinationSystem ORDER BY value DESC
